title: RESOLUTION payload
description: Emitted after an INTENTION's action completes (success, failure, or partial). Releases the claimed scopes in the state graph and notifies any agents whose work depended on this resolving.

intention_id.description: The msg_id of the INTENTION this resolves.

state_diff.description: Optional. Structured description of what changed in the world (e.g., files modified, records created). Used by peers to update their mental model.

side_effects.description: Notable side effects beyond the primary state diff (e.g., 'sent email to user', 'invalidated cache key X').

next_intention_hint.description: Optional. The agent's suggestion for what should happen next. Useful for handoffs to peers.

error.description: Required when outcome = 'failure' or 'partial'. Describes what went wrong.
